pages.text: A Council settles major matters by &6vote&r. When a decision is called, a clickable prompt appears in chat; online players click to cast their vote, and a majority within the time limit carries it.

The town hall's Votes tab lists active and recent votes so you can see what is being decided and how it went. Exile, war, and other weighty acts can be routed through a vote instead of a single leader's word.
Council government rewards consensus: when citizens feel they were consulted, they pull together. The cost is that nothing weighty happens instantly — you must bring people with you.
